positive: A whimsical celestial forest scene viewed from above, featuring giant bioluminescent mushrooms, drifting constellations forming gentle animal silhouettes (such as foxes and deer), and a soft rainbow mist connecting the elements. The style is highly detailed, whimsical watercolor and ink illustration, combining the clean lines of Art Nouveau with the vibrant glow of fantasy concept art. Emphasis on negative space, strong contrast between deep midnight blues and vibrant neon glows (teal, lavender, electric coral). Central composition suitable for t-shirt printing, with clear, bold silhouettes and minimal clutter. High resolution, vector art quality.
negative: blur, grainy, sketch, text, watermark, logo, low quality, bad anatomy, excess limbs, deformed, artifacts, dirty background
